title: Border Expanse
description: Go ahead and explore upon the world with the border constantly moving.
body:
Add an extra challenge to your Minecraft World by putting a world border at the start, it starts off as 4 blocks wide as you progress the border gets bigger, but every 100 blocks, the timer becomes longer.

# How To Setup The Datapack
Put the datapack into a world / server of your choice.

- If importing during a current world that's already been booted up, install and type `/reload` or reboot the world.
- 1.0.3v and above do NOT need this prompt, but if you are playing on 1.0.2 and below this prompt will show up:
![Need OP!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54cc446dc3a246ec7eaf228b34a7ac9a64a8223a.png)
- <small> You need OP in order to make sure this works. </small>


# Commands

If you want to modify how much time is added to timer every 100 blocks, Use this command:
```scoreboard players set #ticks_border.add main <Number>```
Insert how long you want it to be in ticks (20 Ticks = 1 second)
Default is 100.

If you want to see the current border size, use this: ```/trigger bordersize```
It will display in your actionbar and show you the current border size.

# Crafting / Loot Tables
The Dirt block drops sticks along side with dirt.

Here is how you craft OAK PLANKS:

![How to craft the oak planks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6ed2965b7b52a07e773f4efae19418cbf93a624.png)

Note: Normal Oak crafting still works too!

You can also craft emeralds, this is how:

![How to craft Emeralds!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cccd16284c7334c0dc4ad2e191f3289c7a8b3f65.png)

You can smelt Rotten Flesh for Leather:

![Smelt leather!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52de6500f8c48c67ce079ce7e96ac8481a787198.png)
